name: merge-request-review
description: Careful GitLab merge request review workflow with discussion intake, strict findings, re-review loops, and fixed review note formats.

interface.shortDescription: Discussion-aware GitLab merge request review with strict gates and approval discipline
interface.longDescription: A generic GitLab merge request review workflow for Codex. It loads existing discussions first, checks MR-backed verification state, runs repo-appropriate local checks when possible, performs structured normal or high-risk review loops, posts fixed-format review notes, and approves only after blocking findings are resolved. Requires an external GitLab MCP.
defaultPrompt: Review this GitLab merge request carefully before approval
Load the existing discussions first and then review the current MR state
Run a high-risk merge request review for this GitLab MR
Re-review this GitLab merge request after the author pushed fixes
